summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TheCryptoCoach.io iteration 2. Backend APIs are 95% functional with excellent performance. Frontend is mostly working but has critical SEO meta tag issue that needs immediate attention.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 500 error with 'AI service temporarily unavailable'
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Check EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configuration and service availability

integration_issues.issue: Homepage shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of proper TheCryptoCoach SEO title and meta description

passed_tests: Blog page displays exactly 10 SEO-optimized articles with search and category filters
Academy page shows 3-level course structure (Foundations, Investor, Strategist)
User authentication forms (login/register) present and functional
Glossary page with 30+ terms, search functionality, and category filters
Navigation and routing working across all main sections
Professional crypto education theme and branding
Quiz system backend (quiz creation and submission)
Trading simulator backend APIs (prices, portfolio, trade execution)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SEO meta tags - homepage is serving default Emergent meta tags instead of TheCryptoCoach SEO content. Check build process or meta tag implementation. MEDIUM: Investigate AI chat service 500 error.
